'''Glod''' is a huge, muscular [[Giant (race)#Cloud giants|cloud giant]] who can be found on the cloud at the top of the magic beanstalk in the [[Grim Tales]] quest. He has a [[Combat level]] of 138. Glod has the ability to bellow threats at players to either make them run in fear of the huge giant or charge at him in anger. He can also heal himself, similar to the gorillas on Ape Atoll, as well as boost his Attack and Strength, making him a bit harder to kill. When Glod is killed he drops the golden goblin which is a quest item needed for the [[Grim Tales]] quest.

Glod is immune to poison-based attacks. In addition, he also has the ability to disable any active [[Prayer]]s on the player and lower their prayer points by 2% of their current Prayer points plus 20. If you stand at least 3 steps away from him, he will not be able to use his melee attacks.

If Glod has fewer than 75 Hitpoints left, he can randomly regenerate a relatively modest amount of health.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1197452593338998784|date=21 November 2019|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20191121100724/https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1197452593338998784|archivedate=21 November 2019|quote=He does random things periodically, and if he's under 75 HP at the time, one of the random things can be to regenerate HP.}}

A good method of fighting Glod is with magic, standing at the edge of the arena as to render his bellow (that makes players run away) useless. Players will then only have to worry about the bellow that makes them charge forward. Alternatively, using melee with [[Protect from Melee]] will negate damage from his attacks.

He can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete.

==Trivia==
*Upon release, Glod could be fought an infinite number of times. This was changed by an update.
*Glod is an anglicised form of {{WP|Glöð}}, a figure of Norse mythology that appears in the ''{{WP|Þorsteins saga Víkingssonar}}'' as the queen consort to the ''jötunn'' {{WP|Logi (mythology)|Logi}}.
*While fighting, Glod may shout "Glod smash!" and "Glod angry! You wouldn't like Glod when angry!" These are both a reference to the Marvel Comics hero, the Incredible Hulk, who says "Hulk smash!" and "You wouldn't like me when I'm angry."
*Glod's appearance is very similar to that of the Incredible Hulk. It might be possible that Glod's design was based on him.
*Glod is one of the few NPCs that actually has visible fingers.
*Glod was featured as the first question in the RuneScape quiz 14. This quiz was released [[29 June]] [[2010]], the question being "Where can Glod be found?" The answer was "At the top of a beanstalk like all good giants!"
*Glod is currently the largest giant in the game, and the only known living cloud giant. The [[Cloud Titan]] was another known cloud giant, but has been slain some 900 years ago.
*The golden goblin is a reference to the golden hen and the golden harp from the fairy tale: "Jack and the Beanstalk." The giant being found at the top of a beanstalk (and someone murdering the giant and stealing his possessions) is also a reference to Jack and the Beanstalk.
